/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/utils/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/utils/clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/rendering/OpenGL/shaders/OpenGLShader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/rendering/OpenGL/OpenGLRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/rendering/SceneRenderer/SceneRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/rendering/SceneRenderer/RenderBuffer/RenderBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/rendering/SceneRenderer/Patch/patch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/rendering/SceneRenderer/Wireframe/Wireframe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/rendering/SceneRenderer/color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/rendering/Camera/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/display/display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/scene/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/scene/Geometry/Curve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CAD_OpenGL.dir/src/logic/Analysis.cpp.o -o CAD_OpenGL  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libglad.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo
